description: ccp15 vectors for SF EMA load_factor hash_32 congestion control with independent oracle.

Test vectors for CCP-15.2/16 (updated for full SF selection with SNR table, EMA formula, load_factor override, pure pseudocode, select_channel/now() per draft-lichen-tdma, consistent hash_32 vs crc16 in CCP-15.8.3, density rules rationale). All impls MUST match. Includes EMA boundaries, load_factor=0.5/1.0, SF10 default vs override, hash outputs. 6 new vectors added for snr_ema boundaries per table, load_factor override cases, density rationale.

vectors.name: load_factor-override-sf10-to11-dense
vectors.note: load_factor pushes effective_density over 15, overrides SF10 default per clarified rationale

vectors.name: select_channel-now-hash32
vectors.note: hash_32(node_iid XOR now()) % N consistent per CCP-15.8.3; cross-ref draft-lichen-tdma

vectors.name: snr-boundary-sf7-above
vectors.note: snr_ema > -6.0 → SF7 per snr_to_sf table from spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md

vectors.name: load_factor-0.5-no-override-sf10
vectors.note: effective_density=16 but low load_factor=0.5 does not trigger override

vectors.name: load_factor-1.0-dense-override-to-sf11
vectors.note: load_factor=1.0 with density=16 triggers override from SF10 base to 11

vectors.name: density-rationale-sf10-sparse-default
vectors.note: SF10 default for sparse (density<15) per appendix even with SNR suggesting possible higher SF; override only on congestion
